title: Chevin (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the language of the alien species Chevin|the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin species]]}}
'''Chevin''' was the native tongue of the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and the official language of [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vinsoth/Legends|Vinsoth]].

There was another native species to Vinsoth besides of the Chevins: The [[Chev]]s, who had [[Chev (language)|their own language]]. However, the Chevs were [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to the Chevins, and the Chevins forced their Chev slaves to learn Chevin language (usually they also made them learn [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]). Thus, the Chevin language was spoken by both Chevs and Chevins, while Chev language was spoken only by the Chevs.

As all the Chev speakers were familiar with the Chevin language, the Chevin language had a great influence on the Chev language.

Of course, Chevins traveling through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] also learned to speak Basic.

{{Language-stub}}
